strategy: This is an 11,705-health Empyrea boss with two minions - bring a team with a hitter and support, and everyone joins from the start to dodge Mana Burn.
Hit Life or Myth. She takes +10% Life and +5% Myth while resisting 50% Balance and 45% Death, so avoid those two.
Do not use auras. Any aura makes her hit you with Supernova.
After her Balance natural attack she Steal Charms and Steal Wards from a wizard, so do not over-invest blades and shields on someone she is about to swing at.
Keep setup aura-free: stack blades and Feints on your hitter, clear the two Globulin minions with an AoE, and burst her before her charm and ward steals unwind your setup.
cheatNotes: A wizard who joins after round 1 gets hit with Mana Burn, draining pips. Enter from the start.
Casting any aura makes her hit you with Supernova. Skip auras.
After her Balance natural attack she Steal Charms and Steal Wards from the wizard, so do not stack extra blades or shields on the target she just hit.
